span.p:
actual_week = first wN
where complete = false

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
gap = calendar_week − actual_week
ticks_done = sum(tasks[true])
sync_state = 'live'

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Look up phase + week title + 4 tasks
(baked-in WEEK DATA table)
